items.title: 🚀 Vaga Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack .NET Sênior 🚀 📍 Híbrido - Av. Paulista - São Paulo/SP 🚀
items.description:
# Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack .NET Sênior 🚀

- 📍 Localização: Híbrido - Av. Paulista - São Paulo/SP
- 📈 Nível: sênior
- 📃 Contrato: clt
- 💰 Salário: R$ 12.500,00
- 🏃‍♂️ Corre para se candidatar, ainda dá tempo! 🕗


## Descrição da vaga:
Estamos em busca de um(a) Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack .NET Sênior para integrar nossa equipe! 💻

Se você é apaixonado por tecnologia e quer trabalhar em um ambiente dinâmico e colaborativo, essa vaga é para você! 🌟


## Atividades e responsabilidade:
Desenvolver e implementar soluções em .NET, realizar manutenção de sistemas existentes, aplicar boas práticas de programação e colaborar com a equipe em projetos desafiadores. 🤝


## Requisitos:
Experiência sólida em .NET, conhecimento em desenvolvimento front-end e back-end, habilidade em trabalhar em equipe e comunicação efetiva. 🧑‍💻


## Benefícios:
Pacote de benefícios atrativos incluindo assistência médica, vale-refeição e oportunidades de crescimento profissional. 🎉

## Mais Informações:
Para mais informações, entre em contato! 📞

📍 Modelo híbrido: 3x por semana na Av. Paulista/SP.


# [🔗 Clique aqui para se candidatar](https://empregos.dev/vaga/desenvolvedora-fullstack-net-senior-3203)


**Use nosso site [Empregos.dev](https://empregos.dev) para buscar mais vagas de trabalho na área da programação, desenvolvimento, devops e tecnologia como está!**

items.title: [Hibrido / São Paulo, Brasil] Backend Developer na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/backend-developer-193718030?utm_source=github&utm_medium=phpdevbr-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 Estamos buscando **Backend Developer**, sem restrição de nível para compor nosso time. **Responsabilidades:** ● Analisar metodologias e gerenciar o processo de desenvolvimento backend. ● Desenvolver e integrar módulos ao banco de dados. ● Elaborar documentação detalhada de códigos e processos. ● Integrar APIs com interfaces externas. ● Modelar e manter estruturas de bancos de dados. ● Projetar e implementar funcionalidades de aplicações. ● Apoiar a implementação e otimização de sistemas de software. ## Namu:

Começamos nossa trajetória em 2013 com o Portal Namu e desde então nos tornamos uma referência na produção de conteúdo multimídia de bem-estar. Temos a yoga, o pilates e a gastronomia como as principais vertentes da empresa, e mais de 8 milhões de páginas visualizadas compartilhamos ensinamentos em aulas, entrevistas e palestras com as maiores referências nacionais e internacionais. O grande sucesso das aulas de yoga, pilates e gastronomia, com mais de 10 milhões de visualizações no YouTube nos inspirou a criar o Namu Cursos, a primeira plataforma brasileira de cursos online completamente focada em uma vida equilibrada.

Em pouco mais de um ano construímos um portfólio que oferece a oportunidade e comodidade de praticar yoga onde e quando você quiser, com mais de 87 horas de aulas divididas entre 35 cursos. Os cursos são ministrados por professores de referência no Brasil que, em vários anos de estudos e experiência nas melhores escolas ou com os Gurus ao redor do mundo, se capacitaram para ensinar de forma didática e com preço acessível.

## Habilidades: - Node.js - PHP - AWS - Nest.JS - Laravel - Typescript - MySQL - Wordpress ## Local: São Paulo, Brasil ## Requisitos: - Experiência comprovada em testes via APIs. - Domínio de Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript e PHP. - Proficiência em Git (BitBucket). - Experiência com metodologias ágeis de desenvolvimento. - Habilidade em desenvolvimento e integração de APIs REST/RESTful. - Conhecimento em bancos de dados relacionais (MySQL). - Familiaridade com tecnologias AWS (EC2, RDS, CloudWatch, S3, Lambda,...). - Experiência com conteinerização. - Conhecimento em Laravel, Nest.js e WordPress. ## Benefícios: - Convênio médico - Convênio odontológico - Day off de aniversário - Férias remuneradas Acesso à plataforma NAMU - Programa TEM Saúde ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Backend Developer na Namu](https://coodesh.com/jobs/backend-developer-193718030?utm_source=github&utm_medium=phpdevbr-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Alocado #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Full-Stack

items.title: [100% Remoto] Analista de Dados Sênior
items.description:
**Analista de Dados Sênior (Integrações e Automação)**
100% Remoto | Modelo de contratação PJ
Fixo + bônus por desempenho

Se você é movido por desafios e gosta de ver seus projetos ganhando escala real, essa oportunidade foi feita para você.
A empresa atua na fronteira entre mídia, tecnologia e performance digital, desenvolvendo produtos e soluções que unem automação, dados e crescimento exponencial.
Estamos construindo um ecossistema global de plataformas inteligentes e buscamos alguém com mentalidade analítica, curiosa e orientada a entregas — alguém que quer deixar sua marca na construção de algo grande.
Aqui, resultados e autonomia andam juntos: quem entrega, cresce rápido.

**Sua missão**
Você será a referência técnica em dados e automação, conectando times de Growth, Monetization, Product e Tech.
Seu papel será desenhar e otimizar pipelines, integrações e automações que sustentam toda a operação de mídia e performance da empresa — garantindo uma estrutura escalável, eficiente e totalmente data-driven.

**Responsabilidades**
- Projetar, implementar e manter pipelines de dados e automações (n8n, Make, Airflow, Python, APIs).
- Estruturar e otimizar integrações entre sistemas de marketing, dados e operações (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Ringba, Clevertap, Sendgrid etc.).
- Construir e monitorar dashboards e modelos analíticos (BigQuery, Looker Studio, Metabase).
- Desenvolver modelos de atribuição e performance, identificando oportunidades de otimização de ROI.
- Garantir governança, rastreabilidade e qualidade dos dados em colaboração com os times de produto e tecnologia.
- Automatizar fluxos operacionais e processos entre squads.
- Atuar como referência técnica, apoiando analistas plenos e juniores.

**Requisitos Técnicos**
- Ampla experiência em Data Engineering / Data Science / Analytics Engineering.
- Domínio de Python (pandas, airflow, requests, SQLAlchemy).
- Experiência sólida com ferramentas de automação (n8n, Make, Airflow).
- Experiência com integrações via APIs REST / Webhooks.
- SQL avançado, modelagem de dados e ETL/ELT pipelines.
- Vivência com AWS.
- Experiência com ferramentas de BI (Looker Studio, Metabase, Power BI).
- Conhecimento em martech/adtech stacks (Google Ads API, Meta API, Clevertap).

**Diferenciais**

- Experiência em performance marketing, adtech ou mídia digital.
- Conhecimento em Machine Learning aplicado à automação e performance.
- Vivência com Git, Docker, CI/CD.
- Inglês avançado (ambiente global)

**Cultura e Forma de Trabalho**
O ambiente é dinâmico, colaborativo e acelerado — ideal para quem gosta de autonomia, inovação constante e decisões rápidas.
 É valorizado:

- Execução e entrega com impacto real
- Transparência e aprendizado contínuo
- Autonomia com responsabilidade
- Foco em crescimento e resultados concretos

Se você busca um ambiente de alta performance, onde suas entregas ganham escala e reconhecimento, essa é sua chance.
Envie seu currículo para **contato@peoplepartner.com.br**

items.title: Issue: Feature: linkedin/JobBoard scrapper
items.description:
### Select a category

Suggestion

### Issue/Question/Closed Internship

I need a Python/NodeJS script that does the following things:
1. Scrapes LinkedIn Jobs or any other job boards for recently posted Canadian internships in that particular date.
2. Check if that job already exists in the listings.json file
3. Updates the listing.json file accordingly
4. If possible, add a GitHub workflow that runs this script every day

I am already in the process of writing the script. I need someone to help me. 

Thank you in advance.

items.title: Contribute to the repo by creating an issue
items.description:
Steps to follow to post an internship on this repo:

1. Go to LinkedIn or any of the job boards that post Canadian internships. 
2. Find any Canadian internship that is not already in the list
3. Open an issue using the issue template "New Internship"
4. Wait for the issue to be approved 
5. That's it, and you will be added to the contributors list

Thank you in advance for contributing

and in retrospective maybe it would be nice to have a column for popular tags

this could be added to the top of the document so people could use it

items.title: [Remote] Senior Web3/React.js Developer – Token Presale dApp
items.description:
🚨 We’re hiring a **Senior Web3/React.js Developer** to help us scale token sale app — a real-world token presale and staking platform that connects crypto with actual services like food preorders and loyalty rewards.

You’ll be joining a lean, focused team building the next phase of our dApp — including staking mechanics, on-chain rewards, and seamless user dashboards.

**Role Details:**
- **Position:** Senior Software Developer (Solidity / Frontend / Full Stack)
- **Tech Stack:** ethers.js, Solidity, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Vite
- **Work Type:** Fully Remote, async-friendly
- **Schedule:** Full-Time/Part-Time (Up to 40 hrs/week)
- **Compensation:** $120k–$250k/year USD equivalent (based on experience & specialization)

**What We’re Looking For:**
- Experienced blockchain devs with Solidity and smart contract expertise
- Engineers comfortable working across the stack — React.js/TypeScript + backend APIs
- Frontend developers with deep React.js/Next.js experience and Web3 integration exposure
- Clean, well-structured code habits and Git proficiency
- A team-first, async-friendly, product-focused mindset
- Experience working with existing codebases and iterating fast

NDA is required prior to codebase access and technical call.

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy working on, let’s connect. Apply here: https://www.metabytelabs.com/careers/web3-developer, and feel free to send any questions to 📩careers@metabytelabs.com.
Know someone who’s a fit? Referrals welcome at 📩referrals@metabytelabs.com.

items.title: [Stonehenge Group - Senior Fullstack Software Engineer (AI) - Remote - FT]
items.description:
## Location

* Remote (Bangkok HQ, looking for Vietnam-based candidates)

## Salary Expectation

* \$1500–\$2000/month (negotiable) + annual bonus

## Requirements

* 7+ years shipping production code in TypeScript, React.js, Nest.js
* Strong CS fundamentals (data structures, algorithms, Big O notation)
* Familiarity with LLM orchestration (LangGraph/Chain) and AI-assisted IDEs
* Excellent English communication skills

## Must Have

* Fullstack experience (React/Next.js + Node/Nest.js)
* Strong deployment skills (CI/CD, rollback, monitoring)
* Ability to build production services rapidly (days, not weeks)

## Ideally

* Data-intensive project experience with Python
* Machine Learning (NLP, classification, supervised learning)
* Previous startup experience delivering at pace
* Experience as team lead

## Responsibilities

* Architect, develop, and maintain scalable AI-driven software
* Own the full delivery pipeline: code, CI/CD, monitoring, rollback
* Collaborate with CTO on roadmap, SLIs/SLAs, and impact measurement
* Streamline UI/UX handoff into engineering
* Write high-quality documentation and annotations

## You’ll be responsible for

* Delivering real-time AI-powered insights platform
* Designing and maintaining core backend/frontend systems
* Ensuring reliability and scalability across services

## You can bring

* Strong problem-solving and analytical mindset
* Passion for AI-native product development
* Collaborative and proactive working style

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Flexible remote-first work environment
* Competitive salary + annual bonus
* Opportunity to work directly with CTO in a lean, fast-moving startup
* Exposure to cutting-edge AI tools and workflows
* Collaborative, innovative culture

## Interesting Engineering Projects

* AI-powered social media filtering & insight delivery
* Zero-downtime deployment with modern CI/CD practices
* Building scalable graph- and message-queue-driven architectures
* Integrating LLM orchestration into production-grade systems

## Contact

Homepage: [stonehengelabs.io](https://stonehengelabs.io/)
Email: [n@theafenterprise.com](mailto:n@theafenterprise.com)
(currently haven't set up email on stonehengelabs, so please email here)

items.title: Backend Engineer (Go) at Chatsheet - Remote (Taiwan-based candidates)
items.description:
Apply here: https://chatsheet.com/form/f9d7ca51-5f7c-414b-aeaa-d2f7de1da20b

# About Chatsheet
At Chatsheet, we’re offering 100,000 NTD/month—a highly competitive salary in Taiwan—to hire talented Go engineers who want to build AI that automates work by deeply understanding complex data, revolutionizing how businesses operate. As a USA-based early-stage startup, we’re lean, fast, and focused on delivering cutting-edge AI products like Chatsheet, which simplifies and automates workflows with AI. We’re hiring in Taiwan to tap into top talent, giving you a chance to join a dynamic team where your work directly shapes our product and impacts the world.
Why us? We’re not a traditional company with rigid hierarchies. At Chatsheet, you’ll work directly with our founder, tackle challenging problems, and build cool AI-powered solutions. If you’re a curious, driven engineer who wants ownership and impact, this is your shot, no matter your age. Whether you’re a young college grad with exceptional talent or an experienced pro, we’re open to anyone who can deliver.
# About the Team
Our Backend Engineering Team is the backbone of Chatsheet’s AI-driven platform. You’ll build and scale infrastructure, integrate with complex external systems, and create robust, high-performance services. We’re hands-on and end-to-end: you’ll brainstorm, design, code, test, and deploy. No ticket-fixing monotony here—just real engineering challenges that push you to grow.
We value speed, creativity, and results. You’ll have the freedom to experiment, propose solutions, and ship code that matters, all while collaborating closely with a small, sharp team and our founder. Half our team speaks Mandarin, so while strong English skills are required for clear communication, some discussions can happen in Mandarin for your comfort.
# About the Role
We’re hiring talented Go Backend Engineers in Taiwan who are excited to solve tough problems and build AI-driven systems at scale. You’ll work on integrations, distributed architectures, and performance-critical services that power Chatsheet’s mission to automate work. This is a remote role with flexible working hours, letting you work when you’re most productive. We welcome applicants of all ages—whether you’re a fresh college grad with a knack for coding or a seasoned engineer, we value talent and drive above all.
# Must-Haves
Strong Go (Golang) expertise: You write clean, efficient, and maintainable code.
Distributed systems experience: You’ve designed or maintained systems that scale horizontally.
Reliability & observability: You know how to build systems that are robust and easy to monitor.
Database skills: Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL or similar databases.
Strong English skills: Clear written and verbal communication is essential for collaboration with our global team.
# Nice-to-Haves
Familiarity with Docker & Kubernetes for containerized deployments.
Exposure to LLM APIs, embeddings, or RAG patterns—a bonus if you’ve dabbled in AI-related tech.
Passion for tackling messy, real-world integration challenges.
# Why Join Chatsheet?
High salary: Earn 100,000 NTD/month, highly competitive for Taiwan and a reflection of your value to us.
Remote & flexible: Work from anywhere in Taiwan with hours that suit your life.
Flat structure: No bureaucratic layers. Work directly with the founder and have your voice heard.
Challenging work: Solve hard, interesting problems in AI and automation, not repetitive tasks.
Ownership & impact: Your code shapes our product and reaches real users fast.
Growth opportunities: As an early-stage startup, your contributions will define your career trajectory.
Cool AI products: Build cutting-edge systems with AI at the core, including our flagship Chatsheet platform.
Multilingual team: Communicate primarily in English, with Mandarin as an option for some discussions.
Open to all ages: From young, talented college grads to experienced engineers, we hire based on skill and potential.
We’re not a 9–6 corporate grind. If you’re a smart, ambitious engineer who thrives on solving tough problems and wants to grow with a startup, Chatsheet is where you belong.
# Compensation & Benefits
Salary: 100,000 NTD per month—highly competitive for Taiwan.
Remote work: Full flexibility to work from anywhere in Taiwan.
Flexible hours: Choose a schedule that maximizes your productivity.
Startup environment: Fast-paced, with significant growth potential and direct impact.
# Interview Process
Application Review: Submit your CV and a short statement about exceptional work you’ve done.
Coding Take-Home Test: If you pass the application review, we’ll provide a straightforward coding test to showcase your Go skills and problem-solving ability.
# Ready to Build the Future?
If you’re a Go engineer in Taiwan with strong English skills, ready to ditch mundane work for real challenges, join us at Chatsheet. Whether you’re a young grad bursting with talent or an experienced coder, apply now and let’s build AI that changes how the world works.

# Apply Here
https://chatsheet.com/form/f9d7ca51-5f7c-414b-aeaa-d2f7de1da20b

items.title: 🚀 Vaga Desenvolvedor Java 👩🏻‍💻 📍 Remoto 🚀
items.description:
# Desenvolvedor Java 👩🏻‍💻

- 📍 Localização: Remoto
- 📈 Nível: pleno
- 📃 Contrato: clt
- 💰 Salário: R$ 12.400,00
- 🏃‍♂️ Corre para se candidatar, ainda dá tempo! 🕗


## Descrição da vaga:
📣 Vaga para Desenvolvedor Java em home office!

Cliente: Empresa Brasileira de Serviços Hospitalares.


## Atividades e responsabilidade:
🔧 Desenvolvimento em Java (Spring, JPA, Hibernate) e JavaScript (React, Node.js, Angular).
📊 Trabalho com Banco de Dados (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle).
🚀 DevOps utilizando CI/CD (Jenkins, GitLab, GitHub Actions), Docker, Kubernetes, Infraestrutura como Código (Terraform, Ansible).
🔗 Integrações com APIs REST e SOAP.
✅ Execução de testes com JUnit, Selenium, Postman/Newman.
📈 Controle de versão com Git, GitFlow, GitHub, GitLab.
📋 Gestão de projetos com Redmine, Azure DevOps, metodologias ágeis (Scrum/Kanban).


## Requisitos:
🎓 Formação completa em TI.
📚 Pós-graduação em TI.


## Benefícios:
🍴 Vale alimentação (ou refeição);
🚗 Vale transporte;

items.title: [CoderPush - Fullstack JS Developer_ AI Native - Remote - FT]
items.description:
**Location**
Remote-first (HN & HCM office optional)

**Salary Expectation**
Competitive (up to 70M Gross/month depending on experience)

**Requirements**

- 5+ years Fullstack (VueJS/React + NodeJS/TypeScript)
- Strong in software architecture (SOLID, Clean/Hexagonal)
- Database: MongoDB/Supabase, REST/RPC
- Experience with AI ecosystems (LangChain, LlamaIndex, RAG, prompt engineering)
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS/GCP, Kubernetes, serverless/PaaS solutions
- Good English communication (all rounds in English)

**Must Have**

- Solid coding fundamentals & clean architecture mindset
- Experience deploying scalable AI-integrated apps
- Ownership of code quality & system stability (high test coverage, CI/CD best practices)
- Collaborative & open to feedback

**Ideally**

- Knowledge of MLOps, AI model lifecycle, Groq hardware curiosity
- Experience with Supabase, ACID compliance & idempotency

- Responsibilities Building scalable, AI-native fullstack solutions
- Driving architecture decisions & system design
- Leveraging AI tools effectively for productivity
- Collaborating across product, UX, data science & engineering

**You can bring**

- Strong problem-solving & analytical mindset
- Passion for AI + software excellence
- Positive, collaborative attitude

**Why it would be awesome to work with us** 

- Remote-first environment 🌏
- Full insurance per VN Labor Laws
- Annual & performance-based bonus
- Equipment support + training/certification budget
- 22 paid leaves from 5th year (1 month off encouraged)
- Monthly coaching & career development
- Competitive salary & benefits package
- Innovative & collaborative team culture

**Interesting Engineering Projects**

- AI-powered back-office automation for SMEs
- Zero-downtime deployment with CI/CD best practices
- Scalable microservices architecture with AI integration
- High-standard testing pipelines for production stability

**Contact:**
Zalo: 0934440301 (Ms. Tram)

items.title: [Remote-first environment] - Senior Software Engineer (PYTHON) - 120M Gross
items.description:
Location: Ho Chi Minh city, Vietnam
Salary expectation: up to 120M Gross

**Responsibilities**
- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and Django. 
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions. 
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner. 
- Utilize AI tools (e.g., code assistants, automated testing, log analyzers) to streamline development tasks and routine operations. 
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives. 
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements. 
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards. 
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities. 
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues. 
- Resolve, and manage customer-reported incidents and requests. 
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in Python and Django. 
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards. 
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies. 
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner. 
- Utilize AI tools (e.g., code assistants, automated testing, log analyzers) to streamline development tasks and routine operations. 
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives. 

**Qualifications**
- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and Django. 
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP. 
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture. 
- Proficient in working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar. 
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery. 
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git. 
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services. 
- Experience using AI assistants in the development workflow (e.g., Copilot, Cursor). 
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams. 
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes 
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. 
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal. 

_We are a global company with a remote-first culture, but we take pride in our vibrant Ho Chi Minh office as a hub f- for collaboration and innovation. This role is hybrid, so you'll get to enjoy the best of both worlds—flexibility with opportunities to meet, share, and build together._

**Benefits**
Why it would be awesome to work with us
- Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
- Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
- Grow with us: We're invested in your personal and professional development.
- Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 30+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.
- Celebrate together: Enjoy remote and hub company and team  events that strengthen our bonds and build a fun culture.

Feel free to reach out to me via Zalo/Whatsapp +84395392802

items.title: Sr. Software Engineer
items.description:
# Hiring experienced Sr. Software Engineers at Turing! 🚀  
Apply Here: http://turing.com/s/DWBRdK

Turing is one of the fastest-growing AI companies, pushing the boundaries of AI-assisted software development.  
In this role, you’ll review AI-generated code, rank solutions, and provide feedback to improve how Large Language Models (LLMs) learn real-world coding best practices.  

## We’re looking for professionals with:  
- 5+ years of software engineering experience, with 2 years as a full-stack engineer at a leading tech product company  
- Strong skills in code review, debugging, and software design  

## Role Details:  
- **Location:** Global (Remote, flexible 10/20/40 hrs/week)  
- **Work style:** Remote contract (flexible hours, partial PT overlap)  
- **Salary:** $50–$150/hr, depending on experience & geography  

👉 [Check out the full details](https://developers.turing.com/direct-apply/UiGLqtqqU30Y?&utm_source=ad&utm_medium=techmasters&utm_campaign=swe_100&utm_term=techmasters_discord)
